query: What is the most recent World Bank / Argus Media monthly price of liquid sulphur Tampa in USD per metric ton for 2026? What were the values month by month January through June 2026?
answer:
## Summary

**The core finding is a premise mismatch:** there is **no World Bank monthly "Sulphur (Tampa)" price series** to report for 2026. I verified this directly against three World Bank Pink Sheet editions — the **July 2, 2026** edition (the latest, with data through June 2026), the **June 2, 2026** edition, and a **January 2025** historical check. In all three, the Fertilizers section lists only **DAP, Phosphate rock, Potassium chloride, TSP, and Urea** — with no sulphur line. The World Bank discontinued its Sulphur (Tampa) series (it was already gone by January 2025), so **no Jan–Jun 2026 monthly values exist** in the published Pink Sheet.

**What actually exists** is the underlying market benchmark this question tracks: the **Argus "Tampa molten sulphur" contract**, which is **quarterly** (not monthly) and quoted in **USD per long tonne delivered** (not per metric ton):
- Q3 2025: **$76/lt** → Q4 2025: **$116/lt**
- Q1 2026: projected **$475–520/lt** (up from ~$310/lt)
- Q2 2026 (April loadings): **settled at a record** amid the Iran war tightening supply (exact figure paywalled)

So across Jan–Jun 2026 there are only two contract values (Q1 and Q2), not six monthly ones. Corroborating trackers confirm sulphur hit record highs in H1 2026 (e.g., the Chinese CFD benchmark's all-time high of 11,084 CNY/t in June 2026).

**Recommendation for the caller:** If a forecast must resolve on a "World Bank monthly liquid sulphur" number, it would have to come from the World Bank's monthly Excel data file's Sulphur tab (if still maintained there) — which was not machine-readable via available tools — and the premise should be flagged, since the Pink Sheet PDF no longer carries this series.

sources.snippet: Mosaic and Nutrien settled the fourth quarter molten sulphur price at $116/long tonne (lt) delivered, up $40/lt from Q3's $76/lt.

sources.title: US Sulfur Prices Surge as Iran War Tightens Global Supply — quarterly Tampa contract settled at a record in April
sources.snippet: The quarterly Tampa contract settled at a record in April 2026 as the Iran war tightened global supply; Mosaic cut output.
